imagebuilder.distributionconfiguration.C: A distribution configuration allows you to specify the name and description of your output AMI, authorize other AWS accounts to launch the AMI, and replicate the AMI to other AWS Regions. It also allows you to export the AMI to Amazon S3.

imagebuilder.distributionconfiguration.D.Description: The description of this distribution configuration.
The distributions of this distribution configuration formatted as an array of Distribution objects.

imagebuilder.distributionconfiguration.N.Description: The name of this distribution configuration.

imagebuilder.distributionconfiguration.T.Description: The tags of this distribution configuration.
